Function month

pub fn month<T>(
    array: &PrimitiveArray<T>,
) -> Result<PrimitiveArray<Int32Type>, ArrowError>
where
    T: ArrowTemporalType + ArrowNumericType,
    i64: From<<T as ArrowPrimitiveType>::Native>,
ðŸ‘ŽDeprecated since 51.0.0: Use date_part instead
Expand description

Extracts the month of a given temporal primitive array as an array of integers within the range of [1, 12].
